title: The power line that could reshape New York’s grid is hitting snags
summary: On July 3, as a heat wave swept the region, New York State’s grid imported 52 gigawatt-hours of electricity from Canada—enough to meet about 9% of its total electricity demand that day.
caption: output/2026-07-23/the-power-line-that-could-reshape-new-york-s-grid-is-hitting-snags.txt
